overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or torch. The scene appears to be from a survival horror or exploration video game, featuring tall grass, a winding dirt path, and silhouetted trees against a cloudy night sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. Tall grass flanks both sides of the path while dense trees form a dark wall to the right. The scene is illuminated only by a flashlight or torch held by the character, creating a tense, atmospheric mood typical of survival horror games.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a claustrophobic forest trail shrouded in nocturnal darkness. It begins with the camera advancing steadily down a narrow dirt path, where the limited reach of a handheld flashlight cuts through the gloom. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the beam reveals tall grass flanking the trail and a dense wall of silhouetted trees pressing in from the right. The scene maintains this tense, atmospheric progression, keeping the surrounding wilderness obscured in shadow as the light flickers across the rugged terrain.
